positive: Minimalist stylized jungle fauna pattern, featuring highly detailed silhouettes of tropical birds, toucans, monkeys, and exotic flowers interwoven across the composition. The style should be a high-contrast, flat vector illustration with clean lines and crisp edges, emphasizing negative space. Palette should use deep emerald greens, terracotta oranges, sapphire blues, and ivory accents. Composition must be circular and repeating (seamless pattern), centered and designed for apparel textile printing. Studio lighting, high detail, vector graphic, sticker style, graphic design, isolated on white background.
